_comment: HANDS Logistics — Activation SOW Templates & Add-Ons. Edit this file directly in GitHub to refine wording. Loaded by activation-admin.html on page load.

templates.name: Golf Course Brand Activation
templates.blurb: On-course brand execution at a tournament or club — tee box installs, beverage carts, 19th-hole hospitality.
templates.scope:
HANDS will produce on-course brand execution for [BRAND] at [VENUE/TOURNAMENT NAME]. This activation runs across [X] holes plus the [19th hole / clubhouse / pre-round hospitality area], engaging an estimated [X] golfers and [X] spectators across the event window.

Pre-event:
• Warehouse staging of all branded POSM, signage, and bar-build components
• Pre-event site walk with venue ops to confirm placement, power access, and cart-path logistics
• Equipment QC: cooler integrity, tap systems, pour stations, chilled product inventory
• Coordination with course operations on tee-box install windows and 19th-hole setup timing

Load-in:
• [X]-person crew on-site [X] hours before first tee
• Branded tee-box installations at holes [X], [X], and [X] including signage, flag enhancements, and product display
• On-course beverage cart wrapping and product loadout
• Setup of 19th-hole hospitality station with branded backdrop and full cocktail program
• All custom builds inspected and approved before round opens

Live event:
• [X] brand ambassadors on-course handling product sampling, branded giveaways, and engagement with golfers between holes
• [X] lead bartender + [X] support bartender at clubhouse activation
• On-course product replenishment via dedicated runner — no station ever goes empty
• Continuous touch-up of POSM displays as wind, weather, and traffic demand
• Real-time inventory tracking; any mid-event SKU shortage flagged within 15 minutes

Strike:
• Complete teardown of tee-box installations, beverage carts, and 19th-hole station
• All assets returned to HANDS warehouse same evening
• Course handed back to venue ops in original condition
• Post-event report delivered within 48 hours including consumption data, engagement counts, and photo documentation

Client provides: brand product, branded apparel for ambassadors, pre-approved cocktail recipes. HANDS handles everything else end-to-end.

templates.name: On-Account Bar/Restaurant Takeover
templates.blurb: Branded bar takeover at an on-premise venue — custom build, cocktail program, full hospitality service.
templates.scope:
HANDS will produce the on-site execution for [BRAND] at [ACCOUNT NAME], a [X]-hour bar takeover delivering a branded cocktail program, custom build, and full hospitality service to an estimated [X] guests.

Pre-event:
• Warehouse staging of all custom bar-build components, POSM, branded glassware, and signage
• Site walk-through with account GM/F&B director to confirm bar configuration, ice/garnish staging, and back-of-house workflow
• Cocktail program rehearsal and recipe lock with brand and account beverage director
• Pre-event delivery of all branded materials to account

Load-in:
• [X]-person crew on-site [X] hours before service
• Custom bar build installation at primary bar / secondary station
• Branded backbar refresh: bottle displays, lighting accents, signage
• POSM placement throughout venue: door clings, table tents, mirror decals, host stand collateral
• Pre-shift staff briefing with HANDS lead on cocktail recipes, brand story, and service flow

Live event:
• [X] lead bartenders + [X] barbacks delivering the branded cocktail program
• [X] brand ambassadors working the floor for guest engagement and product education
• Continuous bar restock and ice/garnish replenishment by HANDS team — account staff stays focused on their normal program
• On-site account manager from HANDS as single point of contact for the account team and brand reps
• Real-time issue resolution

Strike:
• Complete teardown of custom bar build and all branded materials
• Branded glassware, unused product, and POSM returned to HANDS warehouse or routed to next activation
• Venue restored to standard operating configuration
• Post-event recap within 48 hours: pour counts, consumption against par, guest engagement notes, account team feedback, and photo deck

Client provides: brand product (delivered to HANDS warehouse 1 week prior), brand-approved recipes, brand ambassador wardrobe. HANDS handles all production, staffing, on-site execution, and recap.

templates.name: Off-Premise Pop-Up Activation
templates.blurb: Branded experience at a non-bar venue — gallery, retail, temporary space transformed into a brand environment.
templates.scope:
HANDS will produce a branded pop-up experience for [BRAND] at [VENUE], a non-traditional space activated as a temporary brand environment for an estimated [X] guests across the event window.

Pre-event:
• Warehouse staging of full pop-up build: bar structure, lounge seating, decor, signage, lighting, and POSM
• Site survey: power load, access points, restroom availability, ventilation, surface protection requirements
• Permit coordination if temporary occupancy or alcohol service requires
• Equipment specification: portable bar, refrigeration, ice supply chain, trash management
• Pre-event walkthrough with venue contact and brand creative lead

Load-in:
• [X]-person crew on-site [X] hours before doors
• Full pop-up build: bar fabrication, lounge install, signage hang, lighting setup, decor placement
• Power distribution and AV setup including any branded video content
• POSM placement and brand environment dressing
• Bar setup with full glassware, garnish, and product loadout
• Pre-event QC walkthrough with client lead

Live event:
• [X] bartenders + [X] barbacks running the branded program
• [X] brand ambassadors managing flow, engagement, and giveaways
• [X]-person guest services team handling check-in, line management, and RSVP verification
• On-site producer from HANDS managing crew, vendors, and any venue coordination needs
• Continuous resets between guest waves: glassware turnover, station refresh, bathroom checks
• Live troubleshooting: power, sound, supply chain — anything that comes up

Strike:
• Complete deconstruction of pop-up build
• Venue restored to original condition including any surface protection removal
• All branded assets returned to HANDS warehouse same night
• Trash hauled per venue contract or HANDS arranged disposal
• Post-event recap within 48 hours: attendance count, pour counts, photo deck, vendor performance notes

Client provides: brand product, creative direction (mood boards or finalized brand environment specs), brand ambassador wardrobe, any custom giveaway inventory. HANDS handles design execution, fabrication, staffing, on-site production, and recap.

templates.name: Multi-Day Festival Activation
templates.blurb: Festival or major event footprint — Coachella/EDC/F1 fan zone style. Multi-day rotations, overnight security, content capture.
templates.scope:
HANDS will produce a multi-day branded activation for [BRAND] at [FESTIVAL NAME], running [X] days across [DATES] and engaging an estimated [X] daily attendees in the festival footprint.

Pre-event:
• Warehouse staging of complete activation build: branded structure, full bar setup, lounge area, signage, lighting, POSM, and overnight security materials
• Festival operations coordination: load-in window, vendor parking, credentialing, power tap-in, water access, waste management
• Crew rotation planning: [X] crew shifts per day across [X] day window with staffing handoff protocols
• Daily product replenishment plan with HANDS warehouse-to-site logistics
• Inclement weather contingency planning: tent reinforcement, electronics protection, alternate-day backup staffing

Load-in (Day 0):
• [X]-person crew on-site [X] hours before festival opens
• Full activation build: structure, bar, lounge, signage, lighting, AV
• Power, water, waste connections established with festival ops
• Branded environment dressing and POSM placement
• Daily-reset supplies staged for each subsequent day
• Overnight security handoff to festival staff or HANDS-arranged overnight crew

Live event (each day):
• [X] bartenders + [X] barbacks per shift, rotating across [X]-hour blocks
• [X] brand ambassadors per shift handling engagement, sampling, and giveaways
• [X]-person daily reset team: morning prep, restock, station refresh, trash management
• On-site producer from HANDS daily as single point of contact
• Daily inventory reconciliation: pour counts, product depletion, restock triggers
• Real-time content capture: photos and short-form video from each day for brand social use
• End-of-day breakdown and overnight secure-down

Strike (final day):
• Complete teardown of activation build immediately after festival close
• All assets returned to HANDS warehouse next-day or routed to brand storage
• Festival site restored to delivered condition including any turf, surface, or infrastructure protection removal
• Post-event recap within 5 business days: daily breakdowns, total pour counts, engagement totals, photo deck, content asset library, and recommendations for following year

Client provides: brand product (delivered to HANDS warehouse 2 weeks prior), brand ambassador wardrobe per day, finalized brand creative. HANDS handles multi-day production, staffing rotations, on-site management, content capture, and recap.

templates.name: Trade / Industry Event (B2B)
templates.blurb: WSWA, Tales of the Cocktail, NCB Show — booth + tasting program + lead capture for buyers and trade press.
templates.scope:
HANDS will produce a branded trade-event activation for [BRAND] at [EVENT NAME] on [DATES], targeting an estimated [X] industry buyers, distributors, and trade press across the event window.

Pre-event:
• Warehouse staging of booth build, tasting bar, branded materials, lead capture technology, and trade collateral
• Event ops coordination: booth dimensions, electrical, neighboring vendors, loading dock window, badge access
• Lead capture system setup: tablet-based or scanner workflow tied to brand CRM if requested
• Tasting program planning: pour sizes, flight ordering, palate cleansers, pacing for steady all-day flow
• Pre-event briefing with brand sales team on booth talking points and buyer-tier flow

Load-in:
• [X]-person crew on-site during the load-in window
• Booth fabrication and branded environment install
• Tasting bar setup with chilled product, glassware, garnish prep, and rinse station
• Lead capture tablets configured and tested
• POSM placement: hanging signage, tabletop materials, branded giveaway display
• Pre-event walkthrough with brand sales lead

Live event:
• [X] lead bartenders pouring the tasting program throughout the day
• [X] brand ambassadors engaging with buyers, capturing leads, and routing high-priority contacts to brand sales reps
• On-site producer from HANDS managing crew, restock, and any event-ops issues
• Continuous tasting station refresh: glassware turnover, garnish replenishment, product chill maintenance
• Lead data exported in real time or end-of-day to brand CRM
• Special handling for VIP buyer visits with brand reps available

Strike:
• Complete booth teardown within event-mandated breakdown window
• All assets returned to HANDS warehouse same evening or routed per brand request
• Lead capture data finalized and delivered to brand sales team
• Post-event recap within 3 business days: total leads captured, tier breakdown, pour counts, top-engagement notes, and recommendations

Client provides: brand product, finalized booth creative or brand environment specs, list of priority accounts to flag during the event, brand ambassador wardrobe. HANDS handles booth production, staffing, lead capture, on-site management, and recap.

templates.name: Sports Stadium / Arena Activation
templates.blurb: Pre-game tailgate + in-arena suite + concourse footprint. NFL, NBA, MLB, NHL, F1, partnership-tied activations.
templates.scope:
HANDS will produce a branded sports activation for [BRAND] at [VENUE / TEAM / EVENT NAME] on [DATE/DATES], engaging an estimated [X] attendees across pre-game tailgate, in-arena hospitality, and post-game footprint.

Pre-event:
• Warehouse staging of full activation kit: tailgate build, in-arena POSM, hospitality suite materials, giveaway inventory
• Venue ops coordination: tailgate lot access, in-arena suite setup window, vendor credentials, guest list management
• Distribution coordination if branded giveaways tie to ticketing or partnership terms
• Pre-event walkthrough with team marketing partner / venue rep
• Inclement weather contingency for tailgate component

Load-in:
• [X]-person crew on-site [X] hours before gates
• Tailgate footprint setup: branded tent, tasting bar, lounge seating, signage
• In-arena hospitality suite refresh: branded materials, custom drink program, signage placement
• Concourse POSM placement at any partnership-allocated locations
• Giveaway distribution staging at gate points if applicable
• Pre-event QC walkthrough

Live event:
• Tailgate crew: [X] bartenders + [X] brand ambassadors driving engagement, sampling, and giveaway distribution pre-game
• In-arena suite crew: [X] hospitality staff managing the suite throughout the game including drink service, guest needs, and brand rep coordination
• On-site producer from HANDS as single point of contact across both footprints
• Continuous restock and reset between tailgate window and post-game wind-down
• Real-time issue resolution with venue ops

Strike:
• Tailgate teardown within venue-mandated post-game window
• Suite reset to standard configuration for venue
• All assets returned to HANDS warehouse same evening
• Lot and concourse restored per venue contract
• Post-event recap within 48 hours: estimated engagement counts, pour counts, giveaway depletion, photo documentation, and notes for next event

Client provides: brand product, brand ambassador wardrobe, giveaway inventory (if separately produced), partnership terms for any ticketing or distribution mechanics. HANDS handles tailgate and suite production, multi-footprint staffing, on-site management, and recap.

templates.name: Touring Multi-City Activation
templates.blurb: Recurring activation following a tour or artist across multiple cities — one producer, consistent brand experience per stop.
templates.scope:
HANDS will produce a branded touring activation for [BRAND] supporting [ARTIST / TOUR NAME] across [X] cities from [DATE RANGE]. Each tour stop receives a consistent brand experience adapted to local venue specifications, with HANDS handling end-to-end production at every market.

Pre-event (per stop):
• Stop-specific site survey: venue dimensions, load-in window, power, local alcohol licensing, crew labor rules
• Local vendor sourcing if any city-specific equipment or staffing is needed
• Touring kit logistics: branded build assets shipped market-to-market on HANDS-managed schedule
• Per-city brand product replenishment coordinated through local distributor if direct shipment isn't feasible

Per-tour-stop execution:
• Touring crew lead [X]-person team plus locally-sourced support per city if efficient
• Standard activation footprint: branded bar, POSM, sampling station, giveaway distribution
• Tour-rider coordination with venue and artist tour management on placement, timing, and any artist-facing brand integration
• Daily resets and same-day strike for each market
• Real-time content capture for brand social rollout

Tour-level continuity:
• Single HANDS tour producer as point of contact across all stops
• Centralized inventory tracking across all markets — pour counts, giveaway depletion, content delivered
• Consistent brand environment regardless of venue size: same look, same service, same standard
• Recap pacing: end-of-week summaries during the tour, full recap within 10 business days of tour wrap

Strike (per stop):
• Same-night teardown after each show
• Branded build assets repacked and routed to next market on confirmed shipping schedule
• Local-source rentals returned per vendor contract
• Venue restored

Client provides: brand product (replenishment plan per market), brand ambassador wardrobe shipped to tour producer, finalized creative direction. HANDS handles touring logistics, multi-city production, staffing, content capture, and full-tour recap.

templates.name: Private Event / VIP Dinner
templates.blurb: High-touch, small-format. Brand executives + key accounts. Intimate hospitality, every detail produced to brand standard.
templates.scope:
HANDS will produce a high-touch private event for [BRAND] hosting [X] VIP guests on [DATE]. This is a small-format, fully serviced experience — every detail produced to brand standard with intimate hospitality as the priority.

Pre-event:
• Warehouse staging of all materials: branded bar setup, glassware, custom cocktail program ingredients, POSM, signage
• Venue walk-through with property contact and brand executive lead
• Cocktail program development with brand and any beverage advisor input; recipe lock 1 week prior
• Guest list reconciliation, dietary preference capture, seating coordination with venue
• Pre-event briefing with brand executive on flow, guest priorities, and any specific moments to facilitate

Load-in:
• [X]-person crew on-site [X] hours before guests
• Branded bar setup at primary station
• Custom cocktail prep: batched components, garnish prep, glassware staging
• POSM placement: tasteful brand presence without overwhelming the space
• Guest welcome materials staged at entry
• Pre-service brief with venue staff and HANDS team on guest priorities

Live event:
• [X] lead bartender executing the custom cocktail program
• [X] guest services lead managing arrival, coat check, and seating coordination
• [X] hospitality runners ensuring no guest has an empty glass or unmet need
• Brand executive support: anything needed for brand reps to focus entirely on guest relationships
• Discreet on-site producer from HANDS handling any logistics or troubleshooting away from the guest experience
• Post-dinner cocktail / post-experience moment if scoped

Strike:
• Quiet, complete teardown after final guest departure
• All branded materials and unused product returned to HANDS warehouse
• Venue restored to original condition
• Post-event recap within 48 hours: guest feedback notes from on-site team, consumption summary, photo selection, and recommendations for future VIP programs

Client provides: brand product, finalized guest list, any specific protocol requirements for VIP guests, brand executive availability for pre-event briefing. HANDS handles production, staffing, on-site management, and recap.

templates.name: Charity / Gala Sponsored Activation
templates.blurb: Brand-sponsored bar service at a fundraiser or gala. Sponsorship deliverables baked into the scope.
templates.scope:
HANDS will produce the [BRAND] sponsored bar service at [GALA / FUNDRAISER NAME] on [DATE], delivering branded hospitality to an estimated [X] gala attendees as part of [BRAND]'s sponsorship of the event.

Pre-event:
• Warehouse staging of all materials: branded bar build, signage, glassware, cocktail program ingredients, POSM
• Coordination with gala event production team on bar placement, service flow, and timing relative to programming (cocktail hour, dinner service, dance/late night)
• Cocktail program lock with brand input — appropriate for gala audience and consistent with brand standard
• Sponsorship terms review: any signage requirements, recognition moments, or brand integration commitments
• Pre-event briefing with gala production lead and brand sponsorship contact

Load-in:
• [X]-person crew on-site during venue load-in window
• Branded bar setup integrated with gala visual design — coordinated with event production for cohesion
• POSM placement at sponsor-allocated locations
• Cocktail program prep: batched components, garnish, glassware staging
• Pre-service briefing with HANDS team on sponsorship deliverables and guest experience

Live event:
• [X] lead bartenders + [X] barbacks delivering the branded cocktail program
• [X] brand ambassadors as appropriate to the gala format — scaled to be present without overwhelming
• On-site producer from HANDS managing crew and coordinating with gala production team
• Continuous bar service throughout cocktail hour, dinner reception, and late-night programming as scoped
• Real-time inventory management — gala pours can be unpredictable, HANDS keeps the bar full

Strike:
• Complete bar teardown within gala-mandated breakdown window
• All branded materials returned to HANDS warehouse same evening
• Venue restored per gala production team requirements
• Post-event recap within 48 hours: pour counts, sponsorship deliverable fulfillment notes, guest engagement observations, photo documentation

Client provides: brand product, branded materials per sponsorship terms, any specific recognition copy or signage approved by gala. HANDS handles production, staffing, on-site execution, and recap.

addons.name: Photography & Videography Crew
addons.blurb: Content team capturing photo + short-form video for brand social use
addons.text: + Photography & Videography. HANDS will provide a [X]-person content team capturing photo and short-form video throughout the activation. Deliverables include a minimum of [X] edited photos and [X] short-form video clips suitable for brand social channels, delivered within 5 business days post-event. Raw footage available on request.

addons.name: Influencer Activation
addons.blurb: Confirmed influencer talent management with content posting deliverables
addons.text: + Influencer Activation. HANDS will coordinate [X] confirmed influencers across [X] follower tiers attending the event. Talent management includes booking coordination, on-site hospitality, content brief delivery, and confirmed posting deliverables ([X] feed posts + [X] story posts per influencer) delivered within 48 hours of event end.

addons.name: VIP Hospitality Tier
addons.blurb: Separate VIP component with dedicated entry, premium pours, private seating
addons.text: + VIP Hospitality Tier. HANDS will operate a separate VIP component within the activation including dedicated entry, premium pour menu, private seating area, and [X] dedicated hosts. Capacity for [X] VIP guests with curated cocktail flight and exclusive brand moment opportunities.

addons.name: Branded Merchandise Distribution
addons.blurb: Inventory + on-site distribution of branded giveaway items
addons.text: + Branded Merchandise. HANDS will manage inventory and distribution of branded giveaway items including [X] units of [ITEM]. Receiving, count verification, on-site distribution logistics, end-of-event reconciliation, and surplus return to brand or HANDS warehouse all included.

addons.name: Rideshare Partnership
addons.blurb: Uber/Lyft code distribution + managed pickup zone
addons.text: + Rideshare Partnership. HANDS will coordinate Uber/Lyft code distribution for guest transportation including pre-event code generation, distribution mechanics during the event, and a designated rideshare pickup zone managed on-site for guest safety and flow.

addons.name: Late-Night Service Extension
addons.blurb: Crew stays past primary event window with extended service + scaled menu
addons.text: + Late-Night Extension. Crew remains on-site for [X] additional hours past the primary event window with extended service crew supporting late-night guests. Includes scaled-down menu adapted for late-night flow and expedited strike immediately following close.

addons.name: Multi-Day Continuity Operations
addons.blurb: Daily resets, rolling crew, overnight security across multiple days
addons.text: + Multi-Day Continuity. HANDS will operate the activation across [X] consecutive days with daily resets, rolling crew rotations, overnight asset security (HANDS-arranged or coordinated with venue), and continuous inventory management across all days. Single producer maintains continuity across the full window.

addons.name: DJ / Entertainment Coordination
addons.blurb: Talent booking, AV management, green room ops
addons.text: + Entertainment Coordination. HANDS will coordinate [DJ / live performer / other] including talent booking confirmation, AV management, green room setup, and performance logistics. Includes pre-event sound check window and same-night strike of all AV equipment.

addons.name: Custom Signage / Build Fabrication
addons.blurb: One-off custom builds with full production timeline
addons.text: + Custom Fabrication. HANDS will produce [X] custom-fabricated brand elements including [SIGNAGE / BUILD COMPONENT / DISPLAY]. Production timeline includes design sign-off, fabrication, and delivery to event site no later than [X] business days before load-in. All custom builds inspected and approved before installation.

addons.name: Media / PR Moment
addons.blurb: Press window with talking points, branded backdrop, post-event press kit
addons.text: + Media & PR Moment. HANDS will support a designated press window within the activation including press list management, designated talking points preparation with brand spokesperson, branded photo backdrop with appropriate signage, and post-event press kit delivery within 48 hours.
